prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Insolvency Code of Ethics and disciplinary actions taken under the IPA's Articles of Association, which are specific to the UK's insolvency field but do not directly apply to the regulatory frameworks governing Scotland, as they may have distinct legal processes and professional conduct standards.
